description: Default stock screening filters based on value investing criteria

universe.min_market_cap_description: Pre-filter for liquidity. Only stocks above this market cap are included in the scannable universe. Configurable — increase for large-cap focus, decrease to include small-caps.

pe_ratio.label: P/E Ratio
pe_ratio.description: Price-to-Earnings ratio. Lower = cheaper relative to earnings.

forward_pe.label: Forward P/E
forward_pe.description: P/E based on estimated future earnings. Lower = cheaper on projected growth.

peg_ratio.label: PEG Ratio
peg_ratio.description: P/E divided by growth rate. Below 1 = growth at a reasonable price.

price_to_fcf.label: Price / Free Cash Flow
price_to_fcf.description: How much you pay per dollar of free cash flow. Lower = more cash generation per dollar invested.

debt_to_equity.label: Debt / Equity
debt_to_equity.description: Total debt relative to shareholders equity. Below 1 = conservative balance sheet.

quick_ratio.label: Quick Ratio
quick_ratio.description: Liquid assets / current liabilities. Above 1 = can cover short-term obligations.

operating_margin.label: Operating Margin (%)
operating_margin.description: Percentage of revenue kept after operating costs. Positive = profitable operations.

eps_growth_yoy.label: EPS Growth YoY (%)
eps_growth_yoy.description: Earnings per share growth year-over-year. Positive = growing earnings.

revenue_growth_yoy.label: Revenue Growth YoY (%)
revenue_growth_yoy.description: Revenue growth year-over-year. Positive = growing revenue.

est_lt_growth.label: Est. LT Growth (%)
est_lt_growth.description: Analyst estimated long-term growth rate. Positive = expected to keep growing.

institutional_transactions.label: Institutional Transactions (%)
institutional_transactions.deferred_reason: Requires paid Finnhub tier or finvizfinance local run. Re-enable when paid data source available.
institutional_transactions.description: Net institutional buying (%). Positive = smart money is buying.

target_price_upside.label: Target Price Upside (%)
target_price_upside.description: How far current price is below analyst target. Higher = more upside potential.

sentiment_score.label: Sentiment Score
sentiment_score.description: News sentiment from -1 (very negative) to +1 (very positive). Filters out stocks with bad news.
